creator: yuan.mei@gmail.com
text: I was attempting to compile KiCAD with python console support.  In the process, it required to include a file wxPython/wxPython.h .  In Gentoo linux, the corresponding file is supplied by dev-python/wxpython.  I would guess FreeBSD's x11-toolkits/py-wxPython30 should supply the same file.  However it is not the case.  An alternative is that such file could come from x11-toolkits/wxgtk30, but at the moment neither package supplies this file.
